title: Confogurable (Classic)
description: A resource pack to allow users to easier customize the border fog using core shaders.
body:
Now compatible with Sodium while using the `sodium-shader-support` mod!

This resource pack makes it possible to configure certain parameters of Minecraft's border fog without using mods. You can adjust the fog start, fog end, and the curve of the smoothing between the two.

(Screenshots taken in a world with [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) active)

[Juxtapose page for easy comparison](https://cdn.knightlab.com/libs/juxtapose/latest/embed/index.html?uid=433ad0dc-aab8-11ed-b5bd-6595d9b17862)

DISCLAIMER:
This resource pack uses core shaders to achieve it's functionality, making it sometimes have no effect or unexpected results while using certain rendering mods. It's ideal environment for use is in a vanilla client, however as long as rendering isn't changed by your mods in any major ways, it should be compatible. Core shaders within resource packs are an experimental feature, so they are not guaranteed to work in future versions. (Though I will try to keep this resource pack up-to-date as long as possible)

If you experience issues, please join my discord server and message me about it and I'll get back to you ASAP.
